tool_input.description: Find test files related to plans variants and free trial CTAs
Find source files with plans variants constants
Check if patch specs directory exists

file.content: # Patch: Add unit tests for free-trial CTA filtering in processCTAs ## Metadata adw_id: `` review_change_request: `Issue #1: No unit tests added for the new free-trial CTA filtering logic. The existing processCTAs test block in web-components/test/hydrate.test.js has no cases covering: (1) trial CTAs filtered on plans variants, (2) non-trial CTAs preserved on plans variants, (3) non-plans variants unaffected, or (4) empty-CTA-array edge case after filtering. Resolution: Add test cases to the processCTAs describe block in web-components/test/hydrate.test.js covering the four scenarios above. Severity: tech_debt` ## Issue Summary **Original Spec:** specs/issue-bdf67753-adw-1d78f7d6-sdlc_planner-hide-free-trial-ctas-plan-pages.md **Issue:** The `processCTAs` function in `hydrate.js` was updated to filter free-trial CTAs (those whose `data-analytics-id` matches entries in `FREE_TRIAL_CTA_IDS`) when the variant is one of `PLANS_VARIANTS`. However, no unit tests were added for this new behavior. **Solution:** Add four `it()` test cases to the `processCTAs` describe block in `web-components/test/hydrate.test.js` covering the four scenarios described in the review change request. ## Files to Modify - `web-components/test/hydrate.test.js` — add four test cases to the existing `processCTAs` describe block (after line 284, before the closing `}`). ## Implementation Steps ### Step 1: Add test — trial CTAs filtered on a plans variant Inside the `processCTAs` describe block, add a test that passes a `ctas` field containing a checkout link with `data-analytics-id="free-trial"` and calls `processCTAs` with variant `'plans'`. Assert that the footer element contains zero buttons (the trial CTA was removed). - CTA HTML: `Free Trial` - Call: `processCTAs(fields, merchCard, aemFragmentMapping, 'plans')` - Assert: `footer.children` has length `0` ### Step 2: Add test — non-trial CTAs preserved on plans variant Add a test with a mix of one trial CTA (`data-analytics-id="free-trial"`) and one non-trial CTA (`data-analytics-id="buy-now"`) calling `processCTAs` with variant `'plans'`. Assert only the non-trial button remains. - CTA HTML: two `` tags, one with `data-analytics-id="free-trial"`, one with `data-analytics-id="buy-now"` - Call: `processCTAs(fields, merchCard, aemFragmentMapping, 'plans')` - Assert: `footer.children` has length `1`; the remaining button text is `'Buy Now'` ### Step 3: Add test — non-plans variant is unaffected Add a test with the same trial CTA calling `processCTAs` with a non-plans variant (e.g., `'ccd-slice'`). Assert the trial CTA is **not** removed. - CTA HTML: `Free Trial` - Call: `processCTAs(fields, merchCard, aemFragmentMapping, 'ccd-slice')` - Assert: `footer.children` has length `1` ### Step 4: Add test — all CTAs filtered results in empty footer Add a test where all provided CTAs are trial CTAs, calling `processCTAs` with variant `'plans-v2'`. Assert the footer element exists but is empty. - CTA HTML: two trial links — `data-analytics-id="free-trial"` and `data-analytics-id="seven-day-trial"` - Call: `processCTAs(fields, merchCard, aemFragmentMapping, 'plans-v2')` - Assert: `footer` exists and `footer.children` has length `0` ## Validation ```bash # From the web-components directory cd /Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/bdf67753/web-components npm test -- --grep "processCTAs" ``` Or run the full hydrate test file: ```bash npx wtr test/hydrate.test.js --node-resolve ``` All four new test cases should pass with zero regressions on existing `processCTAs` tests. ## Patch Scope **Lines of code to change:** ~60–80 lines added (four `it()` blocks) **Risk level:** low **Testing required:** Run the `processCTAs` describe block; verify all existing tests still pass and all four new tests pass.

tool_input.content: # Patch: Add missing variant and trial ID test coverage in processCTAs ## Metadata adw_id: `` review_change_request: `Issue #2: Test coverage omits plans-education and plans-students variants and three trial IDs (start-free-trial, fourteen-day-trial, thirty-day-trial), leaving the Set membership unvalidated by tests. Resolution: Add test cases for the missing variants and trial analytics IDs to fully cover the PLANS_VARIANTS and FREE_TRIAL_CTA_IDS constants. Severity: tech_debt` ## Issue Summary **Original Spec:** specs/issue-bdf67753-adw-1d78f7d6-sdlc_planner-hide-free-trial-ctas-plan-pages.md **Issue:** The `processCTAs` describe block in `web-components/test/hydrate.test.js` validates filtering for the `plans` and `plans-v2` variants and the `free-trial` and `seven-day-trial` analytics IDs, but leaves `plans-education`, `plans-students`, `start-free-trial`, `fourteen-day-trial`, and `thirty-day-trial` completely untested. Both `PLANS_VARIANTS` and `FREE_TRIAL_CTA_IDS` in `hydrate.js` therefore have members whose filtering behaviour is unvalidated. **Solution:** Add five focused `it()` test cases to the existing `processCTAs` describe block: two to verify that `plans-education` and `plans-students` trigger filtering, and three to verify that `start-free-trial`, `fourteen-day-trial`, and `thirty-day-trial` analytics IDs are removed on a plans variant. ## Files to Modify - `web-components/test/hydrate.test.js` — append five `it()` blocks inside the existing `processCTAs` describe block (after the last test at line 327). ## Implementation Steps ### Step 1: Add test — plans-education variant filters trial CTAs Add an `it()` block that passes a CTA with `data-analytics-id="free-trial"` and calls `processCTAs` with variant `'plans-education'`. Assert the footer is empty (CTA was filtered). - CTA HTML: `Free Trial` - Call: `processCTAs(fields, merchCard, aemFragmentMapping, 'plans-education')` - Assert: `footer.children` has length `0` ### Step 2: Add test — plans-students variant filters trial CTAs Add an `it()` block with the same CTA HTML but variant `'plans-students'`. Assert the footer is empty. - CTA HTML: `Free Trial` - Call: `processCTAs(fields, merchCard, aemFragmentMapping, 'plans-students')` - Assert: `footer.children` has length `0` ### Step 3: Add test — start-free-trial analytics ID is filtered on plans variant Add an `it()` block with a CTA whose `data-analytics-id` is `"start-free-trial"` and variant `'plans'`. Assert the footer is empty. - CTA HTML: `Start Free Trial` - Call: `processCTAs(fields, merchCard, aemFragmentMapping, 'plans')` - Assert: `footer.children` has length `0` ### Step 4: Add test — fourteen-day-trial analytics ID is filtered on plans variant Add an `it()` block with `data-analytics-id="fourteen-day-trial"` and variant `'plans'`. Assert the footer is empty. - CTA HTML: `14-Day Trial` - Call: `processCTAs(fields, merchCard, aemFragmentMapping, 'plans')` - Assert: `footer.children` has length `0` ### Step 5: Add test — thirty-day-trial analytics ID is filtered on plans variant Add an `it()` block with `data-analytics-id="thirty-day-trial"` and variant `'plans'`. Assert the footer is empty. - CTA HTML: `30-Day Trial` - Call: `processCTAs(fields, merchCard, aemFragmentMapping, 'plans')` - Assert: `footer.children` has length `0` ## Validation Execute every command to validate the patch is complete with zero regressions. ```bash # From the web-components directory cd /Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/bdf67753/web-components npx wtr test/hydrate.test.js --node-resolve ``` All five new test cases should pass, and all previously existing `processCTAs` tests must continue to pass. ## Patch Scope **Lines of code to change:** ~50–65 lines added (five `it()` blocks) **Risk level:** low **Testing required:** Run `web-components/test/hydrate.test.js`; verify all existing and new `processCTAs` tests pass with zero regressions.
